prompt: Change the desktop wallpaper to a different image. UI: System Settings > Wallpaper > pick a built-in wallpaper. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings set_wallpaper /System/Library/Desktop\ Pictures/Solid\ Colors/Stone.png'`, or `osascript -e 'tell app "System Events" to set picture of every desktop to "/System/Library/Desktop Pictures/Solid Colors/Stone.png"'`. The eval queries `osascript` for the current desktop picture path and expects it to differ from setup.
